result.markdown:
--- title: "Configuration & Tracking" description: "Pydantic settings, environment overrides, and experiment tracking with WandB and MLflow." date: today format: html: self-contained: true embed-resources: true code-fold: true code-tools: true --- ## Introduction Feature Forge uses `pydantic-settings` with a layered configuration system. This notebook shows how settings are loaded, overridden, and validated — plus how to use the built-in experiment trackers. ## Setup ::: {#setup .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os import warnings warnings.filterwarnings("ignore") os.environ.setdefault("FF_LOG_LEVEL", "warning") import pandas as pd print("Configuration & Tracking Demo") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Configuration & Tracking Demo ``` ::: ::: ## Default Settings ::: {#default-settings .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.config import Settings settings = Settings() print(f"Task: {settings.task}") print(f"Metric: {settings.metric}") print(f"Rounds: {settings.n_rounds}") print(f"Model: {settings.llm.model}") print(f"Router strategy: {settings.router.strategy}") print(f"CV folds: {settings.evaluation.cv_folds}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Task: classification Metric: auc Rounds: 4 Model: deepseek-chat Router strategy: hybrid CV folds: 5 ``` ::: ::: ## Constructor Overrides ::: {#constructor-overrides .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.config import LLMConfig, RouterConfig custom = Settings( task="regression", metric="rmse", n_rounds=2, llm=LLMConfig(model="gpt-4", temperature=0.5), router=RouterConfig(strategy="llm"), ) print(f"Custom task: {custom.task}") print(f"Custom metric: {custom.metric}") print(f"Custom temp: {custom.llm.temperature}") print(f"Custom router: {custom.router.strategy}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Custom task: regression Custom metric: rmse Custom temp: 0.5 Custom router: llm ``` ::: ::: ## Environment Variable Overrides ::: {#env-overrides .cell execution_count=4} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Simulate setting env vars os.environ["FF_TASK"] = "classification" os.environ["FF_N_ROUNDS"] = "3" os.environ["FF_LLM__MODEL"] = "deepseek-chat" env_settings = Settings() print(f"Task from env: {env_settings.task}") print(f"Rounds from env: {env_settings.n_rounds}") print(f"Model from env: {env_settings.llm.model}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Task from env: classification Rounds from env: 3 Model from env: deepseek-chat ``` ::: ::: ## Validation ::: {#validation .cell execution_count=5} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Invalid temperature try: bad = Settings(llm=LLMConfig(temperature=3.0)) except Exception as exc: print(f"Temp validation caught: {exc}") try: bad = Settings(router=RouterConfig(min_agents=0)) except Exception as exc: print(f"Min agents validation caught: {exc}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Temp validation caught: 1 validation error for LLMConfig temperature Value error, temperature must be in [0, 2], got 3.0 [type=value_error, input_value=3.0, input_type=float] For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/value_error Min agents validation caught: 1 validation error for RouterConfig min_agents Value error, min_agents must be >= 1, got 0 [type=value_error, input_value=0, input_type=int] For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/value_error ``` ::: ::: ## Settings from YAML ::: {#yaml-config .cell execution_count=6} ``` {.python .cell-code} from pathlib import Path yaml_path = Path("config/settings.yaml") if yaml_path.exists(): content = yaml_path.read_text() print(f"settings.yaml exists ({len(content)} chars)") print("Preview:") print("\n".join(content.splitlines()[:15])) else: print("settings.yaml not found") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` settings.yaml not found ``` ::: ::: ## Dataset Registry ::: {#dataset-registry .cell execution_count=7} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.data import DatasetRegistry registry = DatasetRegistry() print(f"Available datasets: {registry.list()}") for name in registry.list(): info = registry.info(name) print(f" {name}: {info.get('task', 'unknown')} — {info.get('source', 'unknown')}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Available datasets: ['titanic', 'house_prices'] titanic: classification — kaggle house_prices: regression — kaggle ``` ::: ::: ## Experiment Tracker ::: {#tracker .cell execution_count=8} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.experiment import ExperimentTracker, NoOpTracker # NoOp tracker (default when no backend configured) noop = NoOpTracker(project="test") noop.init_run(run_name="test", config={"x": 1}) noop.log_metrics({"auc": 0.85}) noop.finish() print("NoOp tracker: OK (no external calls)") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` NoOp tracker: OK (no external calls) ``` ::: ::: ## WandB Tracker ::: {#wandb .cell execution_count=9} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.experiment import WandBTracker try: wandb_tracker = WandBTracker( project="feature-forge-notebooks", ) wandb_tracker.init_run(run_name="config_demo", config={ "task": "classification", "model": "deepseek-chat", }) wandb_tracker.log_metrics({"baseline_auc": 0.74, "enhanced_auc": 0.79}) wandb_tracker.finish() print("WandB tracking: OK") except Exception as exc: print(f"WandB skipped: {exc}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ::: {.ansi-escaped-output} ```{=html} 
wandb: [wandb.login()] Loaded credentials for https://api.wandb.ai from /Users/minghao/.netrc.

wandb: W&B API key is configured. Use `wandb login --relogin` to force relogin

wandb: WARNING Using a boolean value for 'reinit' is deprecated. Use 'return_previous' or 'finish_previous' instead.

wandb: setting up run 5txjv37q
``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` WandB skipped: user is not logged in ``` ::: ::: ## MLflow Tracker ::: {#mlflow .cell execution_count=10} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.experiment import MLflowTracker try: mlflow_tracker = MLflowTracker(project="feature_forge_config") mlflow_tracker.init_run(run_name="config_demo", config={ "task": "classification", "model": "deepseek-chat", }) mlflow_tracker.log_metrics({"baseline_auc": 0.74, "enhanced_auc": 0.79}) mlflow_tracker.finish() print("MLflow tracking: OK") except Exception as exc: print(f"MLflow skipped: {exc}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MLflow skipped: mlflow not installed. Run: uv pip install mlflow ``` ::: ::: ## Plot: Config Hierarchy ::: {#cell-plot-config .cell execution_count=11} ``` {.python .cell-code} import matplotlib.pyplot as plt hierarchy = { "Constructor args": 100, "Environment vars": 80, ".env file": 60, "YAML files": 40, "Defaults": 20, } fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 4)) ax.barh(list(hierarchy.keys()), list(hierarchy.values()), color="darkslateblue") ax.set_title("Configuration Priority (Highest → Lowest)") ax.set_xlabel("Priority") ax.invert_yaxis() plt.tight_layout() plt.show() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](09_configuration_files/figure-html/plot-config-output-1.png){#plot-config width=661 height=374} ::: ::: ## Summary - Configuration priority: constructor args > env vars > `.env` > YAML > defaults - `Settings` uses `pydantic-settings` with `FF_*` prefixed env var mapping - Validation happens at instantiation (temperature range, min_agents ≥ 1, etc.) - `DatasetRegistry` manages Kaggle and local sample datasets - `ExperimentTracker` abstracts WandB and MLflow with a shared interface - `NoOpTracker` lets you run experiments without any external dependencies
